name: D'Vine Inc
recent_news: No school-bus or student-transport footprint identified. Closest FMCSA match (D-EVINE INC, USDOT 2474258, Roselle IL) is a 5-truck for-hire property/freight carrier, not a passenger operator. A separate D'Vine Transportation Inc. (NPI 1376857219) is registered as an ambulance/medical transport provider in Evergreen Park, IL. Neither appears to be a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. No evidence of school-bus operations; appears to be a micro freight or NEMT/livery business at sub-$1M revenue with ~12 employees — well below Summit tuck-in threshold and outside the school-bus contracting space.

name: Johns Transportation
recent_news: No public footprint as a school-bus contractor. Listed address (2231 N Maplewood Ave, Chicago) is a residential block in Logan Square. Phone (312) 320-4597 and owner name (John Psarros) do not surface on Chicago Public Schools vendor lists, ISBE rosters, or FMCSA passenger-carrier records. Likely a sole-proprietor livery/NEMT or special-needs vehicle operator rather than a school-bus company.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Sub-$1M revenue, no identifiable school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Even as a special-needs livery operator it is too small to be a meaningful tuck-in for Summit.

name: Providence Transportation
recent_news: No school-bus or student-transport footprint identified at this Streamwood, IL address (137 Sangra Ct — a residential cul-de-sac). The providencetrans.com website is an unrelated non-emergency medical transport company operating in Louisiana and Georgia. No ISBE/CPS vendor or FMCSA passenger-carrier match for an IL-based Providence Transportation under Frances Savage.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Residential-address micro-operator (~$900K revenue, 12 employees) with no demonstrable district contracts. Below Summit tuck-in scale and likely a NEMT/livery shop rather than a yellow-bus contractor.

name: American Limousine Co
recent_news: Phoenix-area limousine/sedan livery operator; closely matching Yelp listing 'American Limousine & Sedans Services' is marked CLOSED. No evidence of school-bus or special-needs student-transport contracts with any Arizona school district. PO Box address (45479, Phoenix 85064) is consistent with a small livery sole-proprietorship rather than a bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine/sedan livery business, not a yellow-school-bus contractor; possibly defunct. Outside Summit's acquisition criteria.

name: D & R Luxury Transport Svc
recent_news: No discoverable public footprint as a school-bus or student-transportation contractor. Name and 'Luxury Transport' branding indicate a Phoenix-area chauffeur/livery operator. No ADOT, Arizona Department of Education, or FMCSA passenger-carrier record tying the company or Dyanna Yates to school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Luxury/livery service rather than a school-bus contractor; sub-$1M revenue with ~12 employees puts it well below Summit's tuck-in scale even if it did provide any SPED rides.
